senses.definition: a black spice that is used in cooking to give food a spicy flavor

examples.x: She sprinkled some freshly ground black pepper on her pasta to enhance its flavor.
The chef seasoned the steak with a generous amount of cracked black pepper before grilling it.
The aroma of sautéed onions and black pepper filled the kitchen, making mouths water.
He prefers to grind his own black pepper rather than using pre-ground pepper for a more intense flavor.
The recipe called for a pinch of black pepper to balance the sweetness of the dish.

senses.definition: a round loaf of bread made for one person

examples.x: She savored the warm, freshly baked bread roll with a smear of butter melting into it.
The sandwich was served with a side of crispy, golden-brown bread rolls.
He ordered a hearty soup that came with a crusty bread roll on the side.
The breakfast buffet offered a selection of pastries, including croissants and soft bread rolls.

senses.definition: a type of hamburger topped with melted cheese, typically served on a bun

examples.x: He ordered a juicy cheeseburger with all the fixings for lunch at the diner.
The fast-food restaurant's signature dish is their double cheeseburger, topped with two slices of melted cheese.
She couldn't resist the temptation of a classic cheeseburger paired with crispy fries for dinner.
The new gourmet burger joint offers a variety of unique toppings for their customizable cheeseburgers.
They celebrated their road trip with a picnic in the park, complete with homemade cheeseburgers cooked on the grill.

senses.definition: a variety of dishes originating from South Asia, typically made with meat, vegetables, etc., cooked in a hot sauce and then served with rice

examples.x: She cooked a flavorful chicken curry with aromatic spices and creamy coconut milk for dinner.
The restaurant's menu offers a variety of curry dishes, including vegetarian options like chickpea curry and paneer curry.
He enjoys experimenting with different curry recipes, adding his own twist with unique spice blends and ingredients.
We ordered a takeaway curry from our favorite Indian restaurant to enjoy with naan bread and rice at home.
The aroma of simmering curry wafted through the kitchen, enticing everyone to gather around the table for dinner.

senses.definition: a type of dish consisting of a mixture of chopped fruits

examples.x: She prepared a refreshing fruit salad with a colorful assortment of sliced strawberries, kiwi, pineapple, and grapes.
The picnic basket was packed with sandwiches, chips, and a large bowl of fruit salad for a healthy outdoor lunch.
He drizzled honey and lime juice over the fruit salad to enhance its sweetness and add a zesty flavor.
The school cafeteria offers fruit salad as a nutritious option for students to enjoy during lunchtime.
She brought a large bowl of fruit salad to the potluck party, earning compliments for its vibrant presentation and delicious taste.

senses.definition: a type of vegetable having a strong smell and spicy flavor that is used in cooking

examples.x: She added minced garlic to the pan for extra flavor.
The pasta sauce tasted rich with the addition of garlic and herbs.

senses.definition: a type of green vegetable that is long and thin and is used in cooking

examples.x: It's best to blanch the green beans before freezing them for long-term storage.
The vitamin A present in green beans plays a crucial role in maintaining healthy skin.
You can roast green beans in the oven with a sprinkle of parmesan cheese for a delicious snack.

senses.definition: the leaves of the plant lettuce that are used in salads
a type of dish for which meat or vegetables are cut into small pieces to be pressed together and then baked
leaves of a mint plant
a flat round cake that is thin and is made with milk, eggs, and flour, cooked on a hot surface, typically a griddle or frying pan

examples.x: She flipped the pancake onto the griddle, eagerly awaiting the golden-brown perfection on the other side.
Every Sunday morning, they gather in the kitchen to make a batch of fluffy pancakes topped with fresh berries.
The diner serves stacks of pancakes with a variety of toppings, from classic maple syrup to decadent chocolate chips.
He prefers his pancakes with a dollop of whipped cream and a sprinkle of powdered sugar for an extra touch of sweetness.
The aroma of sizzling pancakes filled the air, drawing hungry guests to the breakfast buffet.

senses.definition: the soft food or paste that is made from ground peanuts

examples.x: Peanut butter was the secret ingredient for his famous cookies.
The children enjoy peanut butter on toast.
She made a classic peanut butter and jelly sandwich for her lunch, spreading a generous layer of creamy peanut butter on two slices of bread.
The bakery offers a variety of cookies, including chocolate chip cookies filled with a gooey peanut butter center.
The recipe calls for two tablespoons of peanut butter.

senses.definition: (of a diet or food) completely or mainly consisting of plants
a type of snack made from a type of corn kernel that expands and puffs up when heated

examples.x: The movie theater was filled with the savory aroma of freshly popped popcorn as patrons lined up at the concession stand.
She melted butter and drizzled it over a bowl of hot popcorn, sprinkling it with salt for a classic movie night snack.
At the carnival, children eagerly waited in line for bags of colorful, flavored popcorn, choosing from options like caramel, cheese, and kettle corn.
He popped a bag of microwave popcorn and settled onto the couch, ready to binge-watch his favorite TV series.
The air was filled with excitement and the sound of popping kernels as families gathered around the campfire to make popcorn over an open flame.

senses.definition: a vegetable, usually a small cucumber, that is preserved in salt water or vinegar

examples.x: She packed a lunchbox with a turkey sandwich layered with pickles.
When I tasted the pickles, I was pleasantly surprised by the perfect balance of sourness and spices.

senses.definition: related to foods that have not been exposed to heat or any form of cooking

examples.x: He preferred raw sushi, with fresh fish and rice wrapped in seaweed.
They snacked on raw nuts and seeds for a healthy boost of energy.
The raw oysters were served on ice with a squeeze of lemon.
He liked his steak cooked rare, almost raw in the center.

senses.definition: (of fruit or crop) fully developed and ready for consumption

examples.x: You can enjoy the natural sweetness of a ripe peach by biting into it and letting the juice drip down your chin.
She picked a ripe avocado that yielded slightly to gentle pressure.
The ripe strawberries were bursting with juicy sweetness.
He waited until the bananas were ripe with brown speckles before making banana bread.
The tomatoes were perfectly ripe, with a vibrant red color and firm texture.

senses.definition: (of food or drink) sold to someone for eating or drinking outside the place it is bought from

examples.x: They ordered a take-away for dinner after a long day.
The take-away menu included a variety of vegetarian options.
We picked up some Chinese take-away on the way home.
The take-away came in eco-friendly packaging.
They sat in the park enjoying their take-away sandwiches.

senses.definition: describing a food or drink without any sugar
potatoes that are boiled and then crushed to become soft and smooth

examples.x: She served grilled chicken with mashed potato.
She prepared a bowl of mashed potato for the baby.
Mashed potato is a comfort food for many people.
The recipe recommends pairing the dish with mashed potato.
He prefers mashed potato over roasted potatoes.

senses.definition: a curved-shape roll that is sweet in taste and is usually eaten at breakfast

examples.x: The bakery's display case was filled with golden brown croissants, freshly baked and fragrant.
The aroma of baking croissants wafted through the kitchen, signaling that breakfast was almost ready.
They indulged in warm chocolate croissants for dessert, the perfect end to a delicious meal.

senses.definition: a sandwich that is made with tortilla wrapped around meat, vegetables, etc.
a small cake baked in the shape of a small cup and usually topped with frosting

examples.x: She decorated each cupcake with swirls of colorful frosting and sprinkles, creating a sweet and festive treat.
The bakery offered a variety of gourmet cupcakes, from classic vanilla to decadent red velvet.
He surprised her with a box of freshly baked cupcakes for her birthday, knowing they were her favorite dessert.
The children giggled with excitement as they frosted their own cupcakes at the birthday party.
She enjoyed a raspberry-filled cupcake with a cup of tea, finding comfort in the simple pleasure of a homemade treat.

senses.definition: a type of sweet dessert made from soft cheese on a cake or biscuit base

examples.x: She baked a classic New York-style cheesecake for the party.
The café offers a variety of cheesecakes, including strawberry and chocolate.
He topped the cheesecake with fresh berries and a drizzle of syrup.
The chef decorated the cheesecake with edible flowers for a fancy touch.
The recipe calls for cream cheese and a crumbly biscuit base to make the cheesecake.

senses.definition: a small, ring-shaped fried cake made from sweetened dough

examples.x: She treated herself to a chocolate-glazed donut with sprinkles as a mid-morning snack.
The bakery displayed rows of freshly baked donuts in a variety of flavors, enticing passersby with their sweet aroma.
He picked up a box of assorted donuts to share with his coworkers as a Friday morning treat.
The children eagerly licked the sugary glaze off their fingers after devouring their favorite jelly-filled donuts.
She savored the last bite of her maple-bacon donut, savoring the perfect balance of sweet and salty flavors.

senses.definition: a diet that restricts and reduces the consumption of foods high in fats

examples.x: She decided to adopt a low-fat diet after her doctor advised her to make dietary changes to improve her cholesterol levels.
The nutritionist recommended a low-fat diet to her clients as part of their weight loss plan.
He found success in managing his heart health by following a low-fat diet and incorporating regular exercise into his routine.
The cookbook featured a variety of delicious recipes suitable for a low-fat diet, making healthy eating enjoyable and flavorful.
She noticed improvements in her energy levels and overall well-being after switching to a low-fat diet and increasing her intake of fruits and vegetables.

senses.definition: a diet that limits the consumption of carbohydrates, particularly those found in grains and sugary foods

examples.x: He decided to try a low-carb diet to manage his blood sugar levels and improve his overall health.
The ketogenic diet is a popular example of a low-carb diet that emphasizes high fat intake and very low carbohydrate consumption.
She found success in losing weight by following a low-carb diet and tracking her daily carbohydrate intake.
The doctor recommended a low-carb diet to her patient as part of a comprehensive treatment plan for managing insulin resistance.

senses.definition: a diet that stops the consumption of gluten altogether

examples.x: She switched to a gluten-free diet after being diagnosed with celiac disease to manage her symptoms and promote intestinal healing.
He follows a gluten-free diet to alleviate digestive issues and skin irritations associated with gluten consumption.

senses.definition: the unit used to measure the amount of energy that a food produces

examples.x: Consuming more calories than your body needs can lead to weight gain over time.
Many people track their daily calorie intake to manage their weight and maintain a healthy diet.
Exercise helps burn calories and can contribute to weight loss or weight maintenance.
Food labels often include information about the number of calories per serving to help consumers make informed choices about their diet.

senses.definition: food that is essential to one's growth and health

examples.x: Fruits and vegetables are essential components of a healthy diet, providing valuable nutrition and vitamins to nourish the body.
As an athlete, he pays close attention to his nutrition, ensuring that his diet provides the fuel and nutrients needed for optimal performance.
The school implemented a nutrition education program to teach students about the importance of making healthy food choices and maintaining balanced diets.

senses.definition: a type of food that is brown and sweet and is made from ground cocoa seeds

examples.x: The cake was adorned with chocolate shavings, making it irresistible to chocolate lovers.
For Valentine's Day, he gifted her a box of assorted chocolates.
The artisanal chocolate shop offers a variety of unique chocolate flavors.

senses.definition: a hollow fruit, typically red, green, or yellow, eaten as a vegetable either raw or cooked with other food

examples.x: As a vegetarian, she often substitutes meat with grilled peppers in her sandwiches.
She couldn't handle the spiciness of the pepper and reached for a glass of water to cool her mouth.
She prefers eating raw pepper as a healthy snack.

senses.definition: a type of sweet, dessert made from sugar, gelatin, and a variety of flavorings

examples.x: Jell-O shots, made by mixing gelatin with alcohol, are a favorite party treat among adults.
